name: BiliStalker MCP Server — Bilibili Creator Tracker
what_it_does: MCP server for tracking Bilibili creators and retrieving the latest updates on videos, dynamics (posts), and articles. Enables AI agents to monitor specific Bilibili creators, fetch their recent content, and track activity on China's largest video platform for anime, gaming, and tech content.
use_cases: Monitoring specific Bilibili creators for new content from media tracking agents
Retrieving latest videos and posts from followed creators for content aggregation agents
Tracking Bilibili creator activity for competitive intelligence or fan engagement agents
Building Chinese social media content monitoring workflows for market research
not_for: Mass scraping of content (violates Bilibili ToS)
Commercial content redistribution without proper licensing
best_when: A user or team monitoring specific Bilibili creators wants AI agents to track new videos, dynamics, and posts — getting automated alerts or summaries of creator activity on Bilibili.
avoid_when: You need comprehensive Chinese social media coverage beyond Bilibili. Also: Bilibili's API terms restrict commercial use and automated scraping.

auth.notes: Bilibili session credentials (cookies) may be required for authenticated API access. Public content may be accessible without auth. Community implementation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free open source; Bilibili API access is free
pricing.notes: Free open source MCP server. Bilibili has no public API fees — community implementation using Bilibili's web APIs.

performance.rate_limits: Bilibili rate limits apply; aggressive use risks IP blocks

known_agent_gotchas: Bilibili's unofficial API may change without notice — breaking the MCP server
Chinese internet: access from outside China may require VPN or proxy
Content primarily in Chinese — Chinese language processing required for agents
Bilibili ToS: automated tracking and scraping may violate terms of service
Session credentials (cookies) expire — long-running agents need credential refresh
agent_readiness.security_notes: Bilibili session credentials must be protected. Chinese platform with local data policies. Unofficial API use — stability not guaranteed. ToS compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Unofficial Bilibili API usage. Session credentials at risk. Chinese data sovereignty. ToS compliance. Scraping risk of IP blocks.
